title: Outlook Integration with CRM needs filter options
excerpt: In the Monday CRM there needs to be the ability to choose additional triggers in the email & activities integration. for example if there is an incoming email AND it matches an email in a column and it is in this group i…

posts.author: mckensie.east (McKensie East)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Monday CRM there needs to be the ability to choose additional triggers in the email & activities integration. for example if there is an incoming email AND it matches an email in a column and it is in this group it sends a notification to x but if its in another group it goes to y
